title: GET /api/v1/accounts/:id/followers and /following
description: Implement paginated follower and following lists. /followers returns accounts that follow the given account. /following returns accounts the given account follows. Both support max_id, since_id, min_id, limit. Return Account objects. Includes both local and remote accounts.
design: Followers: JOIN followers with remote_accounts. Following: JOIN follows with accounts or remote_accounts depending on followee_id vs followee_remote_id. Serialize each as Account object. Local followers: full account object. Remote followers: account object from remote_accounts data.
acceptance_criteria: Follower list returns correct accounts; following list returns correct accounts; pagination via Link header works; private accounts only show followers to themselves (or their followers)
